## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?
- Any important implementation notes?

## Scope

- [ ] Single-purpose change (no unrelated edits)
- [ ] Existing behavior preserved unless intentionally changed
- [ ] Simplest viable approach used

## Documentation

- [ ] Root `README.md` reviewed and updated if conventions/index changed
- [ ] Script docs in `docs/scripts/` updated for behavior/flag/output changes
- [ ] Existing docs were updated instead of creating redundant docs

## Testing / Validation

- [ ] Ran script `--help` and validated CLI output
- [ ] Ran relevant smoke test command(s)
- [ ] Verified error handling path(s) if applicable
- [ ] Verified output paths/files as expected

### Validation Commands

```bash
# Add commands run for validation
```

## Safety and Risk Check

- [ ] Safe defaults preserved
- [ ] No destructive behavior introduced unintentionally
- [ ] Input/output paths handled explicitly
- [ ] Logs do not expose secrets/sensitive data

## Script-Specific Notes

- Script(s) affected:
- Any new flags/options:
- Output/state changes:
- Known limitations or follow-ups:

## Reviewer Notes

- Areas where feedback is most needed:
- Trade-offs considered:
